name: a2b Logistics Agent
description: Public discovery card for a2b Logistics services, company information, and quote request support.

skills.name: Get Company Info
skills.description: Return a2b Logistics public company information, services, contact details, and website references.

skills.name: List Services
skills.description: List a2b Logistics public service categories for trucking, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain support.

skills.name: Request Quote
skills.description: Help prepare a logistics quote request and direct the user to a2b Logistics sales contact.
